phrases.intent_en: Ask when the boutique gets new arrivals
phrases.cultural_note: Luxury boutiques on Pařížská typically receive scheduled deliveries twice a week.

likely_response.local: Nové kolekce přicházejí v úterý a pátek.
likely_response.translation_en: New collections arrive on Tuesday and Friday.

responses.english: New collections arrive on Tuesday and Friday.
responses.french: Nové kolekce přicházejí v úterý a pátek.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the VAT refund desk is in this store
phrases.text_local: Kde je přepážka pro vrácení DPH?
phrases.cultural_note: Many luxury boutiques on Pařížská have a dedicated desk near the rear for tax-free processing.

likely_response.translation_en: At the back behind the cash registers, on the left.

responses.english: At the back behind the cash registers, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this item is available in other sizes
phrases.text_local: Máte to i v jiných velikostech?
phrases.cultural_note: Sales assistants in Pařížská boutiques will proactively offer to retrieve additional sizes from the stockroom.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, I will bring you other sizes.

responses.english: Yes, I will bring you other sizes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book through hotel concierge here
phrases.text_local: Jak si tady můžu rezervovat přes hotelového concierge?
phrases.cultural_note: High-end hotels near Pařížská offer concierge services that handle restaurant bookings directly.

likely_response.local: Nechte to na recepci, zařídíme to za vás.
likely_response.translation_en: Leave it at reception, we will arrange it for you.

responses.english: Leave it at reception, we will arrange it for you.
responses.french: Nechte to na recepci, zařídíme to za vás.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if parking meters accept cards
phrases.cultural_note: Street parking meters in central Prague generally accept both contactless cards and coins.
